methodology: Articles sourced from Virginia-specific RSS feeds and Google News RSS, filtered for AI/technology/workforce relevance, then assessed by Claude against the scenario framework. Each article is tagged with the region it most affects and the scenario it signals toward.

signals.title: AI pressure grows on Richmond's young workforce - Axios
signals.signal_reading: AI-driven workforce pressure on young workers in Richmond signals demand without accompanying deep skill development infrastructure, suggesting shallow adoption that could widen capability gaps rather than building local expertise.

signals.title: New partnership between VCU and AI Ready RVA aims to boost AI education, innovation and community impact - VCU News
signals.signal_reading: VCU's partnership with AI Ready RVA represents deliberate institutional investment in distributed AI education and community impact, signaling potential for peer-network-driven deep capability building beyond elite tech enclaves.

signals.title: EPA grant backs community-driven workforce training in Southwest Virginia - Virginia Tech News
signals.signal_reading: EPA-backed community-driven workforce training in Southwest Virginia suggests grassroots capacity building in historically underserved regions, potentially distributing foundational skills that could enable peer-to-peer AI adoption despite infrastructure challenges.

signals.title: NVTC Spotlights Region's AI Trailblazers: Meet the 2026 AI50 - PR Newswire
signals.signal_reading: NVTC's AI50 recognition of regional trailblazers reinforces NoVA's concentration of deep AI talent and expertise, creating a recognized hub that attracts further investment while potentially intensifying the metro-rural capability divide.

signals.title: NoVA School Systems Grapple with AI’s Role in the Classroom - Northern Virginia Magazine
signals.signal_reading: NoVA schools grappling with AI in classrooms signals platform-level tool adoption spreading through institutions, but without clarity on whether this builds deep technical fluency or merely shallow consumption of AI-powered products.
